zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破延续
zh.content:
XRP/USD当前维持震荡上行结构，价格运行于1.30关口上方，短线多头仍占据主动。24小时涨幅虽有限，但价格贴近阶段高点，显示市场买盘支撑仍然存在，整体情绪偏谨慎乐观。

从技术指标观察，当前价格高于SMA20均线1.29853，说明短周期趋势仍偏多。MACD处于负值区域，表明上涨动能尚未完全释放，空头压力依然存在，若后续MACD出现低位金叉，将增强反弹确认信号。

关键支撑位关注1.2980与1.2950区域，若失守可能回测1.2880附近。上方短线阻力位位于1.3120，其后则是1.3200整数关口。一旦放量突破阻力区，行情有机会进一步打开上升空间。

操作策略上，短线交易者可关注回踩均线后的低吸机会，但不宜盲目追高。稳健型投资者建议等待MACD与成交量同步转强后再考虑加仓，同时严格设置止损，防范高位震荡带来的回撤风险。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is showing a modest bullish recovery after stabilizing above the 1.3000 psychological level. The pair traded within a narrow intraday range between 1.2956 and 1.30778, suggesting buyers are gradually regaining control following recent downside pressure. Price action holding above the 20-day simple moving average at 1.29853 strengthens the short-term constructive outlook. As long as XRP remains above this moving average, momentum favors a continuation toward higher resistance zones rather than a deeper retracement.

The MACD reading at -0.00655 still reflects lingering bearish momentum, although the negative value appears relatively shallow. This indicates that downside pressure is weakening rather than accelerating. While the absence of a current RSI reading limits confirmation of momentum strength, the market structure suggests consolidation with a bullish bias. A sustained close above 1.3080 could encourage additional buying activity and potentially trigger momentum-driven trades toward the next upside objectives.

Immediate support is positioned near 1.2985, aligning closely with the SMA(20), while stronger downside protection sits around 1.2950. If sellers break below this area, XRP could revisit the 1.2850 region. On the upside, resistance appears near 1.3100, followed by a broader barrier around 1.3250 where profit-taking may emerge. A breakout above these levels would improve the medium-term technical picture and open space for stronger bullish continuation.

Short-term traders may consider buying pullbacks toward the 1.3000–1.2985 zone while maintaining disciplined stop-loss placement below 1.2950. More conservative participants could wait for confirmation through a decisive breakout above 1.3100 before entering long positions. Given the still-negative MACD environment, aggressive leverage may remain risky until momentum indicators fully turn positive. Overall, XRP/USD currently favors cautious bullish positioning with close attention to support stability and breakout confirmation.
